name: style-detector
responsibility: Detect and analyze existing frontend design language in a project. Parses CSS/SCSS/Tailwind config to extract style tokens. Accepts user-provided screenshots for visual style analysis. Synthesizes findings into a designMd constraint document for provider generation.

api_detail.method: Scan projectRoot for style-related files: tailwind.config.{js,ts,mjs}, *.css, *.scss, design-tokens.json, theme.{js,ts}. Returns detected=false if none found.
Use LLM vision to analyze screenshots. Extract dominant colors, typography style, spacing density, border-radius, animation impression, overall design language.
Convert StyleProfile into a Stitch-compatible designMd markdown document. Uses LLM to write coherent design system description from extracted tokens.

fields.name: fonts
fields.constraints: font family names in order of preference

fields.name: borderRadius
fields.constraints: size name → value. e.g. {sm: '4px', lg: '16px', full: '9999px'}

fields.name: darkMode
fields.constraints: true if dark mode detected as primary or supported

fields.name: priority
fields.constraints: higher = more authoritative. tailwind-config > theme-file > design-tokens > css > scss

nfr_constraints.performance: File scanning < 5 seconds. CSS parsing < 10 seconds. Screenshot analysis < 30 seconds.
nfr_constraints.security: Only read files within project root. Never execute config files (read as text).
nfr_constraints.other: Coverage: CSS + Tailwind + SCSS as primary targets. styled-components/CSS-in-JS not covered initially (ACCEPT_COST).
